name: Spooky - Trapped in her mansion
description:
"Welcome, honorable guest."

For as long as you can remember, legends have been told about the derelict mansion upon the hill that casts a blanket of darkness over the town. The history of the house itself is virtually unknown, and even blah blah blah. There's a ghost with boobs in the mansion that's it.

SHE IS AGED UP.

whoops looks like the event wasnt about to end my bad

Depending on how much this event may last, this may be my last halloween event or not. Character is from Spooky's House of Jumpscares, or Spooky's Jumpscare mansion. Pretty good game trust me.

And by the way, happy Nonstop Nut November. I invite you all to spend it with my bots
